title: Connection, by default, must use "Panel"(Tab) from it's Folder
author: Apollon-Theos
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
If I define "Panel" in folder, all connections must use this value, but I can edit this

## Expected Behavior
Folder user for grouping servers by service, all neighboring servers better use in one Panel(Tab)


## Current Behavior
All new connections have "General" in Panel, not use "Panel" from folder

## Possible Solution
if connection created inside folder, use settings from Folder.

## Steps to Reproduce (for bug...

iterations.description: The default setting for inheriting the 'Panel' property is currently false, preventing new connections from automatically adopting the parent folder's panel.

comments.author: nmat
comments.snippet:
Do you mean something like: https://mremoteng.readthedocs.io/en/latest/folders_and_inheritance.html

or are you referring to something different?

Not sure exactly what you mean.

comments.author: Apollon-Theos
comments.snippet:
You think right, but now this is option for connection, not folder. 
Normal way, when I define inheritance some options for folder and any new connection use it.

comments.author: nmat
comments.snippet:
You want a panel to have inheritence?

I am sorry I do not understand what you mean. Is it possible you can give some more example?

comments.author: Apollon-Theos
comments.snippet:
Example:
1. I create folder for connections.
2. Define some properties (Panel, Protocol, Icon, Resolution, Redirections, Proxy and etc). Maybe check checkbox "Inherit changed properties"
3. Create new connection inside this folder. This new connection have defined all changed properties, that I define for folder.

Like folder and files at filesystem. 

Because better one time define lot of properties on folder, than repeat this definition for every connection.
If need can change inherite...

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: I am planning some changes regarding this so that kind of additional grouping and yes possible will implement such

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The default setting for inheriting the 'Panel' property is currently false, preventing new connections from automatically adopting the parent folder's panel.
Approach: Change the default value of the InhDefaultPanel setting in mRemoteNG\Properties\Settings.settings from False to True.
